pr.title: [Non-record] Quantization Findings: SWA Reversal + Int5 Failure

output.summary: Averaging 84 checkpoints via SWA smooths weights so int6+zstd quantization beats the last checkpoint, while int5 MLP quantization crashes undertrained models.
techniques: SWA checkpoint averaging to smooth quantization-sensitive outliers
int6+zstd quantization with STE-QAT for stabilized roundtrips
mixed int5/int6 quantization exposes undertraining sensitivity
